excerpt:
The app is awsome, i just wish there were more options when logging into it on meta quest, more options to change size /height/ realism of avatar would be great - its hard to confide in a cartoon and the more realistic 'legacy' avatars look like meth heads - but have better facial-(but no body)- customisation!? I have now paid for a platinum subscription and I am seeing literally no difference from the basic plan, you really need to offer more for the highest paying subscribers. Ill just wait.
